mapper.select: SELECT su.user_id AS userId, su.username, su.real_name AS realName, su.phone, su.avatar, su.role_type AS roleType, su.status, su.balance, su.create_time AS createTime, su.last_login_time AS lastLoginTime FROM sys_user su WHERE su.role_type = 1 -- 1表示农户角色 AND su.is_deleted = 0 -- 未删除 ORDER BY su.create_time DESC

SELECT su.user_id AS userId, su.username, su.real_name AS realName, su.phone, su.avatar, su.role_type AS roleType, su.status, su.balance, su.create_time AS createTime, su.last_login_time AS lastLoginTime FROM sys_user su WHERE su.role_type = 1 -- 1表示农户角色 AND su.is_deleted = 0 -- 未删除
AND ( su.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR su.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR su.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY su.create_time DESC

SELECT su.user_id AS userId, su.username, su.real_name AS realName, su.phone, su.avatar, su.role_type AS roleType, su.status, su.balance, su.create_time AS createTime, su.last_login_time AS lastLoginTime FROM sys_user su WHERE su.user_id = #{farmerId} AND su.role_type = 1 -- 1表示农户角色 AND su.is_deleted = 0 -- 未删除
